zh.lifeSummary: 當Millicent la Zouche於1295年2月15日出生在英國英格蘭諾薩普頓史爾哈利沃斯時，她的父親William la Zouche 1st Baron Zouche18歲，母親Maud Lovell16歲。她於1326年3月26日之前與William Deincourt, Second Baron d'Eynecourt在英國林可爾史爾布藍可尼結婚。他們至少是1個兒子和1個女兒的父母。她去世於1379年6月22日在英國林可爾史爾布藍可尼享年84歲，埋葬在英國英格蘭林可爾史爾布藍可尼。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Millicent la Zouche于1295年2月15日出生在英国英格兰諾薩普頓史爾哈利沃斯时，她的父亲William la Zouche 1st Baron Zouche18岁，母亲Maud Lovell16岁。她于1326年3月26日之前与William Deincourt, Second Baron d'Eynecourt在英国林可爾史爾布藍可尼结婚。他们至少是1个儿子和1个女儿的父母。她去世于1379年6月22日在英国林可爾史爾布藍可尼享年84岁，埋葬在英国英格兰林可爾史爾布藍可尼。

nameMeanings.name: la
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Vietnamese Hung, Cuong, Anh, Thanh, Ha, Hoang, Tuan, Chau, Hao, Hien, Hoa, Hue, Nam, Phong, Sinh, Tuong, Min, Tam, Tanh, Thai, Tham, Tinh, Yeong.  Chinese Hong, Hang, Sang, Tong, Chan, Chi, Hwa Ja, Hyung, Kam, Ki Bong, Kin, Man.
Vietnamese: from the Chinese surname 羅, see   Luo   1.
Vietnamese (Lã): from the Chinese surname 呂, see Lu 6 and 3 below.

variants.name: Luo
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Chinese Wei, Jian, Yi, Ping, Yong, Zhen, Feng, Hong, Ming, Jin, Bin, Chen, Hai, Lan, Min, Huan, Hung, Shen, Tian.

Mandarin form of the surname 羅, meaning ‘net for catching birds’ or ‘to collect’ in Chinese: (i) from Luo (羅), the name of an ancient state (located in present-day Hubei province). After it was annexed by the state of Chu during the early Spring and Autumn period (770–476  BC ), people from the state migrated southwards and adopted Luo (羅) as their surname. (ii) from the Po Duo Luo (破多羅) and Chi Luo (叱羅) families from the Xianbei ethnic group in northern China, who changed their original surnames to 羅 during the Northern Wei dynasty (386–534  AD ). (iii) from the personal name Hu Se Luo (斛瑟羅), leader of an ancient Turkic tribe who are believed to have migrated to China during the Tang dynasty (618–907  AD ). His descendants inherited his name Hu Se Luo (斛瑟羅) as their surname and shortened it to 羅 during the Northern Wei dynasty (386–534  AD ). (iv) from the name of one of the seven families from the Bandun Man, an ethnic group residing in ancient southwestern China (located mainly in present-day Sichuan province).

nameMeanings.name: Zouche
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.

variants.name: Zaucha
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Polish Andrzej, Casimir, Franciszek, Kazimierz, Krzysztof, Mieczyslaw, Rafal, Wojciech.
Polish: descriptive nickname from za uchem ‘behind the ear’, denoting someone who had something behind one of his ears. Compare Zoucha .

nameMeanings.name: Millicent
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: From an Old French name, Melisende, of Germanic (Frankish) origin, from amal ‘labour’ + swinth ‘strength’. This was the name of a daughter of Charlemagne. It was adopted by the Normans and introduced by them to Britain.

historicEvents.title: Famine Strikes Europe
historicEvents.description: A famine caused by cold winters and wet summers across Europe caused millions to die due to starvation. Desperation from hunger caused high levels of crime, stampedes in bread lines in London, infanticide, and even cannibalism throughout Europe.

historicEvents.title: First War of Scottish Independence
historicEvents.description: The First War of Scottish Independence began after England invaded Scotland in 1296. The Treaty of Edinburgh was signed in 1328 which declared peace between the two kingdoms and brought the war to an end.

historicEvents.title: The Hundred Years' War
historicEvents.description: The Hundred Years' War between France and England was largely due to the question of legitimate succession to the French crown.

en.lifeSummary: When Millicent la Zouche was born on 15 February 1295, in Harringworth, Northamptonshire, England, United Kingdom, her father, William la Zouche 1st Baron Zouche, was 18 and her mother, Maud Lovell, was 16. She married William Deincourt, Second Baron d'Eynecourt before 26 March 1326, in Blankney, Lincolnshire, England. They were the parents of at least 1 son and 1 daughter. She died on 22 June 1379, in Blankney, Lincolnshire, England, at the age of 84, and was buried in Blankney, Lincolnshire, England, United Kingdom.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Millicent la Zouche est née le 15 février 1295, à Harringworth, Northamptonshire, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni, son père, William la Zouche 1st Baron Zouche, avait 18 ans et sa mère, Maud Lovell, avait 16 ans. Elle a épousé William Deincourt, Second Baron d'Eynecourt avant 26 mars 1326, à Blankney, Lincolnshire, Angleterre. Ils ont eu au moins 1 fils et 1 fille. Elle est décédée le 22 juin 1379, à Blankney, Lincolnshire, Angleterre, à l’âge de 84 ans, et a été enterrée à Blankney, Lincolnshire, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni.

de.lifeSummary: Als Millicent la Zouche am 15. Februar 1295 in Harringworth, Northamptonshire, England, United Kingdom geboren wurde, war ihr Vater William la Zouche 1st Baron Zouche 18 und ihre Mutter Maud Lovell 16. Sie hat vor 26. März 1326 in Blankney, Lincolnshire, England William Deincourt, Second Baron d'Eynecourt geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 1 Sohn und 1 Tochter. Sie starb am 22. Juni 1379 im Alter von 84 Jahren in Blankney, Lincolnshire, England und wurde in Blankney, Lincolnshire, England, United Kingdom begraben.

it.lifeSummary: Quando Millicent la Zouche è nata il il 15 febbraio 1295 nel Harringworth, Northamptonshire, Inghilterra, Regno Unito, sua padre, William la Zouche 1st Baron Zouche, aveva 18 anni e sua madre, Maud Lovell, aveva 16 anni. Lei sposato William Deincourt, Second Baron d'Eynecourt prima del 26 marzo 1326, nel Blankney, Lincolnshire, England. Erano genitori di almeno 1 figlio e 1 figlia. Morì il 22 giugno 1379, nel Blankney, Lincolnshire, England, all'età di 84 anni, e fu sepolta a Blankney, Lincolnshire, Inghilterra, Regno Unito.

ja.lifeSummary: Millicent la Zoucheが1295年2月15日にイギリスイギリスノーサンプトンシュアイアハーリングウオルスで生まれた時，父William la Zouche 1st Baron Zoucheは18歳，母Maud Lovellは16歳であった。1326年3月26日以前にイギリスリンコルンシュアイアブランクニーでWilliam Deincourt, Second Baron d'Eynecourtと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも1人の息子と1人の娘の親であった。彼女は1379年6月22日にイギリスリンコルンシュアイアブランクニーで84歳で死去し，イギリスイギリスリンコルンシュアイアブランクニーにて埋葬された。

ko.lifeSummary: Millicent la Zouche(이)가 1295년 2월 15일 영국 잉글랜드 노르섬프토실르 해링워스에서 태어났을 때, 그녀의 아버지 William la Zouche 1st Baron Zouche(은)는 18세였고, 그녀의 어머니 Maud Lovell(은)는 16세였다. 그녀는 1326년 3월 26일 이전 영국 링코실르 블랭니에서 William Deincourt, Second Baron d'Eynecourt(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 한 명의 아들과 한 명의 딸을 두었다. 그녀는 1379년 6월 22일 영국 링코실르 블랭니에서 84세의 나이로 사망했으며 영국 잉글랜드 링코실르 블랭니에 묻혔다.

pt.15 February 1295–22 June 1379: 15 de fevereiro de 1295–22 de junho de 1379
pt.lifeSummary: Quando Millicent la Zouche nasceu em 15 de fevereiro de 1295, em Harringworth, Northamptonshire, Inglaterra, United Kingdom, seu pai, William la Zouche 1st Baron Zouche, tinha 18 anos e sua mãe, Maud Lovell, tinha 16 anos. Ela casou-se com William Deincourt, Second Baron d'Eynecourt antes 26 de março de 1326, em Blankney, Lincolnshire, Inglaterra. Eles tiveram pelo menos 1 filho e 1 filha. Ela faleceu em 22 de junho de 1379, em Blankney, Lincolnshire, Inglaterra, com 84 anos, e foi sepultada em Blankney, Lincolnshire, Inglaterra, United Kingdom.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Millicent la Zouche родилась 15 февраля 1295 г. в местности харрингворт, нортамптоншир, Англия, Великобритания, её отцу по имени William la Zouche 1st Baron Zouche было 18 лет, а матери, которую звали Maud Lovell, 16. Она вышла замуж за человека по имени William Deincourt, Second Baron d'Eynecourt перед 26 марта 1326 г. в местности бланни, линколншир, Англия. У них был по крайней мере 1 сын и 1 дочь. Она умерла 22 июня 1379 г. в местности бланни, линколншир, Англия в возрасте 84 лет и была похоронена в местности бланни, линколншир, Англия, Великобритания.

es.15 February 1295–22 June 1379: 15 de febrero de 1295–22 de junio de 1379
es.lifeSummary: Cuando Millicent la Zouche nació el 15 de febrero de 1295, en Harringworth, Northamptonshire, Inglaterra, Reino Unido, su papá, William la Zouche 1st Baron Zouche, tenía 18 años y su mamá, Maud Lovell, tenía 16 años. Se casó con William Deincourt, Second Baron d'Eynecourt antes de 26 de marzo de 1326, en Blankney, Lincolnshire, Inglaterra. Fueron padres de por lo menos 1 hijo y 1 hija. Murió el 22 de junio de 1379, en Blankney, Lincolnshire, Inglaterra, a la edad de 84 años, y fue sepultada en Blankney, Lincolnshire, Inglaterra, Reino Unido.
